tasks.name: Replace font imports in fonts.ts

action.target: Inter import with Plus_Jakarta_Sans and DM_Sans imports

tasks.purpose: Import the new Google Fonts for Bold Geometric design system

constraints: Use Google Font naming: Plus_Jakarta_Sans (underscore, space replaced)
Use Google Font naming: DM_Sans (underscore, space replaced)

tasks.input_state: apps/web/lib/fonts.ts imports Inter as SansFont from next/font/google
tasks.output_state: apps/web/lib/fonts.ts imports Plus_Jakarta_Sans and DM_Sans from next/font/google, Inter import removed
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Line 2 of apps/web/lib/fonts.ts contains import of Plus_Jakarta_Sans and DM_Sans
tasks.verification_command: grep -E 'import \{ Plus_Jakarta_Sans, DM_Sans \} from "next/font/google"' apps/web/lib/fonts.ts && ! grep -E 'Inter.*from "next/font/google"' apps/web/lib/fonts.ts

tasks.name: Configure sans font constant with DM Sans

action.target: sans font constant with DM Sans

tasks.purpose: Set DM Sans as the body text font with optimal weights for performance
tasks.input_state: sans constant uses Inter font configuration
tasks.output_state: sans constant uses DM_Sans({ subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-sans", fallback: ["system-ui", "Helvetica Neue", "Helvetica", "Arial"], preload: true, weight: ["400", "500", "700"] })
tasks.acceptance_criterion: sans constant in apps/web/lib/fonts.ts is configured with DM_Sans and all required properties (subsets, variable, fallback, preload, weight)
tasks.verification_command: grep -A7 'const sans = DM_Sans' apps/web/lib/fonts.ts | grep -E '(subsets|variable|fallback|preload|weight)' | wc -l | grep -q '5'

tasks.name: Configure heading font constant with Plus Jakarta Sans

action.target: heading font constant with Plus Jakarta Sans

tasks.purpose: Set Plus Jakarta Sans as the display/headings font with optimal weights

constraints: Replace heading alias with independent Plus_Jakarta_Sans configuration

tasks.input_state: heading constant is aliased to sans (const heading = sans)
tasks.output_state: heading constant uses Plus_Jakarta_Sans({ subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-heading", fallback: ["system-ui", "Helvetica Neue", "Helvetica", "Arial"], preload: true, weight: ["500", "600", "700"] })
tasks.acceptance_criterion: heading constant in apps/web/lib/fonts.ts is configured with Plus_Jakarta_Sans (not aliased to sans) and all required properties
tasks.verification_command: grep -A7 'const heading = Plus_Jakarta_Sans' apps/web/lib/fonts.ts | grep -E '(subsets|variable|fallback|preload|weight)' | wc -l | grep -q '5'

tasks.name: Run typecheck to verify font configuration
tasks.purpose: Verify font configuration is type-safe and no errors introduced

constraints: Font types must be compatible with existing layout integration

tasks.input_state: apps/web/lib/fonts.ts has been modified with new font imports and configurations
tasks.output_state: pnpm typecheck passes with no errors
tasks.acceptance_criterion: pnpm typecheck command completes successfully with exit code 0
